recent_projects.name: havoc-clustering
recent_projects.summary: Histomic Atlases of Variation Of Cancers (HAVOC) is a versatile tool that helps map histomic heterogeneity across H&E-stained digital slide images to help guide regional deployment of molecular resources to the most relevant/biodiverse tumor niches

recent_projects.summary: Набор простых и удобных утилит для Python, который избавляет от рутины при работе с конфигурацией и логированием в новых проектах.

recent_no_license_projects.name: laddr
recent_no_license_projects.summary: Laddr is a framework to build, run, and scale multi-agent systems that communicate, delegate, and execute tasks in parallel. Each agent can run multiple workers, powered by a queue-based delegation system that ensures horizontal scalability and resilience.
